goal: Implement exact-tab discovery, secret-free provider auth probes, background routing, and legacy manifest packaging without changing the generated legacy runtime body.
non_goals: No content-sidecar, server, UI, rewrite-extension, MCP execution, or user-browser edits.
do_not_touch: extensions/mcp-superassistant-local-fixed/background.js after the one new first-line import
acceptance_criteria: Provider URLs are validated and sanitized before returning.
Existing exact ready tabId is preserved and provider drift fails closed.
MAIN-world auth probes return only provider, booleans, and bounded reason codes.
Manifest version 0.6.8 loads only the legacy sidecars and legacy permission regressions pass.
